items.title_en: US singer D4vd charged with murder stemming from death of missing teenage girl
items.title_zh: 美国歌手 D4vd 因失踪少女死亡被控谋杀
items.desc_en: Prosecutors say he could face life in prison due to special circumstances surrounding the girl's disappearance and death.
items.desc_zh: 检察官表示，由于女孩失踪和死亡的特殊情况，他可能面临终身监禁。

items.title_en: Oil prices jump after Iran and U.S. attack commercial ships as tensions escalate over Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势升级，伊朗和美国袭击商船后油价上涨
items.desc_en: Crude oil prices surged Sunday, as the U.S. and Iran teetered on the brink of a renewed war after attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡商船遇袭后，美国和伊朗濒临新一轮战争，原油价格周日飙升。

items.title_en: Cash has been a better portfolio diversifier than Treasurys, Morningstar finds. Where to nab attractive yields
items.title_zh: 晨星公司发现，现金是比国债更好的投资组合多元化工具。在哪里可以获得有吸引力的收益
items.desc_en: With Fed rate cuts on hold, these cash assets still have solid yields.
items.desc_zh: 在美联储暂缓降息的情况下，这些现金资产仍具有稳健的收益率。

items.title_en: Hormuz disruptions hit China’s Christmas capital — and holiday spending
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹的中断袭击了中国的圣诞之都和节日消费
items.desc_en: Manufacturers told CNBC that shoppers will likely have to pay higher prices to match rising costs of plastic and other materials.
items.desc_zh: 制造商告诉 CNBC，购物者可能不得不支付更高的价格，以应对塑料和其他材料成本上涨的情况。

items.title_en: These are the earnings reports NYSE insider Jay Woods is watching this week
items.title_zh: 这些是纽约证券交易所内部人士杰·伍兹本周正在观看的收益报告
items.desc_en: In a weekly video to CNBC PRO subscribers, Woods discussed what he's watching in a market at records.
items.desc_zh: 在每周向 CNBC PRO 订阅者播放的视频中，伍兹讨论了他在记录市场中观察到的情况。

items.title_en: Tariff refunds begin on Monday. These retailers are due big paydays
items.title_zh: 关税退款从周一开始。这些零售商将迎来丰厚的发薪日
items.desc_en: U.S. importers, such as Walmart and Target, could be in line for billions in tariff refunds as the government launches its claims-filing portal on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 随着政府周一推出索赔申请门户，沃尔玛和塔吉特等美国进口商可能会获得数十亿美元的关税退款。

items.title_en: Trailblazing black beauty queen who defied apartheid South Africa dies aged 76
items.title_zh: 南非反抗种族隔离制度的黑人选美皇后去世，享年 76 岁
items.desc_en: At the 1972 Miss World contest, Cynthia Shange was one of two contestants from South Africa - one black and one white.
items.desc_zh: 在 1972 年世界小姐比赛中，辛西娅·尚格 (Cynthia Shange) 是来自南非的两名参赛者之一（一黑人一白人）。

items.title_en: Police gunfight with favela gang traps 200 tourists on hilltop
items.title_zh: 警方与贫民窟团伙发生枪战，200名游客被困在山顶
items.desc_en: The access route to Morro Dois Irmãos was blocked during the operation in Vidigal, leaving scores of alarmed sightseers stuck on the hill.
items.desc_zh: 在维迪加尔的行动中，通往莫罗·多伊斯·伊尔芒斯 (Morro Dois Irmãos) 的通道被封锁，导致数十名惊慌失措的游客被困在山上。

items.title_en: Chair nominee Kevin Warsh says Fed must ‘stay in its lane’ to maintain independence
items.title_zh: 主席提名人凯文·沃什表示，美联储必须“坚持自己的路线”以保持独立性
items.desc_en: Warsh also expressed firm commitment to fighting inflation with only one mention of the labor market.
items.desc_zh: 沃什还表达了对抗通胀的坚定承诺，其中只提到了劳动力市场。

items.desc_en: Ethics issues have roiled Congress in recent months, as allegations against Reps. Eric Swalwell and Tony Gonzales led to both members resigning last week.
items.desc_zh: 近几个月来，道德问题扰乱了国会，对众议员埃里克·斯瓦尔韦尔和托尼·冈萨雷斯的指控导致两名议员上周辞职。

items.title_en: Days of Our Lives and Starship Troopers actor Patrick Muldoon dies aged 57

items.desc_en: "For the most part, this is not a market that's on sale," Marks said Monday.
items.desc_zh: “在很大程度上，这不是一个正在出售的市场，”马克斯周一表示。

items.title_en: QA Crow
items.title_zh: QA Crow
items.desc_en: A murder of crows for your bug backlog
items.desc_zh: 为你的 bug 积压而谋杀乌鸦

items.title_en: Rumen Radev looks set to win Bulgarian Parliamentary election
items.title_zh: 鲁门·拉德夫 (Rumen Radev) 有望赢得保加利亚议会选举
items.desc_en: Exit polls put his Progressive Bulgaria on 37%, more than double the score of the closest runner-up, but he will likely need to form a coalition to govern.
items.desc_zh: 出口民意调查显示，他的进步保加利亚支持率为 37%，是最接近的亚军得分的两倍多，但他可能需要组建一个联盟来执政。

items.title_en: Claude Desktop Buddy
items.title_zh: Claude Desktop Buddy
items.desc_en: Bring Claude into the physical world with maker hardware
items.desc_zh: 通过创客硬件将克劳德带入现实世界

items.title_en: Ukraine police chief resigns after officers allegedly fled deadly shooting
items.title_zh: 乌克兰警察局长因涉嫌逃离致命枪击事件而辞职
items.desc_en: Authorities say the officers have been suspended and an investigation into their actions is under way.
items.desc_zh: 当局表示，这些警员已被停职，并对他们的行为进行调查。

items.title_en: Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, police say
items.title_zh: 警方称路易斯安那州枪击事件中八名儿童丧生
items.desc_en: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting in Shreveport, Louisiana, which police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".
items.desc_zh: 这些儿童年龄从 1 岁到 14 岁不等，他们在路易斯安那州什里夫波特的一次枪击事件中丧生，警方将其描述为“家庭骚乱”。

items.title_en: GalaxyBrain
items.title_zh: GalaxyBrain
items.desc_en: An information operating system powered by local files
items.desc_zh: 由本地文件驱动的信息操作系统

items.title_en: EchoTube
items.title_zh: EchoTube
items.desc_en: Fast, private Open Source YouTube client
items.desc_zh: 快速、私密的开源 YouTube 客户端

items.title_en: White House and Anthropic set aside court fight to meet amid fears over Mythos model
items.title_zh: 由于对神话模型的担忧，白宫和 Anthropic 搁置了法庭诉讼以进行会面
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump previously railed against the company for rejecting broad government demands.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统此前曾批评该公司拒绝广泛的政府要求。

items.title_en: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI
items.title_zh: Tinder 和 Zoom 提供“人性证明”眼部扫描来对抗人工智能
items.desc_en: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.
items.desc_zh: 该技术旨在识别人们的虹膜并阻止虚假账户和恶意诈骗的兴起。

items.title_en: What is Claude Mythos and what risks does it pose?
items.title_zh: 什么是克劳德神话？它会带来什么风险？
items.desc_en: The company's claim the AI tool can outperform humans at some hacking and cyber-security tasks has sparked fears in the financial world.
items.desc_zh: 该公司声称人工智能工具可以在某些黑客和网络安全任务上超越人类，这引发了金融界的担忧。

items.title_en: Could a digital twin make you into a 'superworker'?
items.title_zh: 数字孪生能让你成为“超级工人”吗？
items.desc_en: Firms say digital twins make staff more productive, but are they a potential legal minefield?
items.desc_zh: 公司表示，数字孪生可以提高员工的工作效率，但它们是否是潜在的法律雷区？

items.title_en: OptionV
items.title_zh: OptionV
items.desc_en: MacOS menubar clipboard manager
items.desc_zh: MacOS 菜单栏剪贴板管理器

items.title_en: Social media leaders called to Downing Street over children's safety
items.title_zh: 社交媒体领导人就儿童安全问题向唐宁街呼吁
items.desc_en: Top executives from firms such as Meta and YouTube will be asked what they are doing to protect children.
items.desc_zh: Meta 和 YouTube 等公司的高管将被问到他们正在采取哪些措施来保护儿童。

items.desc_en: Pin business, get interest, be found
items.desc_zh: 固定业务、获得兴趣、被发现

items.desc_en: E-commerce accounting that runs itself
items.desc_zh: 自行运行的电子商务会计

items.desc_en: Swiss legal AI, built by lawyers for lawyers
items.desc_zh: 瑞士法律人工智能，由律师为律师打造

items.desc_en: AI for biomanufacturers

items.desc_en: Building digital sign language avatars & inclusive datasets.
items.desc_zh: 构建数字手语头像和包容性数据集。

items.title_en: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
items.title_zh: Booking.com 客户被黑客攻击后收到“预订劫持”警告
items.desc_en: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.
items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_en: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站
items.desc_en: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Can pedestrians, runners and cyclists safely share the road with self-driving vehicles?
items.desc_zh: 行人、跑步者和骑自行车的人能否安全地与自动驾驶车辆共享道路？

items.title_en: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 一名男子被指控在袭击 OpenAI 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 家时企图谋杀
items.desc_en: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。

items.title_en: Quantum computing: A tech race Europe could win?
items.title_zh: 量子计算：欧洲可以赢得科技竞赛吗？
items.desc_en: With some promising computing companies in the field, could Europe be a leader in quantum tech?
items.desc_zh: 凭借该领域一些有前景的计算公司，欧洲能否成为量子技术的领导者？

items.title_en: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.title_en: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
items.title_zh: GTA 制作商 Rockstar Games 再次遭到黑客攻击，但淡化影响
items.desc_en: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.
items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss Sam Altman's home targeted with Molotov cocktail
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的家遭到燃烧弹攻击
items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.
items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Is there a way to fix AI's problem with trust?
items.desc_zh: 有没有办法解决人工智能的信任问题？

items.title_zh: The New Waydev
items.desc_en: Measure the full AI SDLC. From token to production.
items.desc_zh: 测量完整的 AI SDLC。从代币到生产。

items.title_zh: Makko AI
items.desc_en: Make 2D game art and playable games. No drawing. No coding.
items.desc_zh: 制作 2D 游戏美术和可玩游戏。没有图画。没有编码。
